description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly red and black color scheme, featuring a robust rectangular body and a large, curved magazine. The left side displays a golden eagle insignia, suggesting a militaristic or factional affiliation. The grip is dark and ergonomically shaped, with a pronounced trigger guard and a metallic finish. The barrel is short and thick, with a vented shroud beneath it and a rail system running along the top. The right side is mostly plain red, lacking insignia, and the rear of the object is blocky with visible mechanical details. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible wear and scratches, indicating frequent use.
description: A compact, red and black shotgun with a curved magazine, golden insignia, and a robust, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the golden eagle insignia, vented barrel shroud, and detailed grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick barrel opening, rail system, and symmetrical body structure.
description_view_2: Right side view with a plain red body, visible magazine, and mechanical details near the grip.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the blocky back end, grip alignment, and the top rail's structure.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a thick, short profile and vented shroud beneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
